Meetup Presentation

The "Security Data Lake" vs. The Legacy SIEM

Discover why modern security teams are abandoning traditional hot-tier SIEMs in favor of S3-backed architectures, and how Agentic SecOps bridges the gap between massive telemetry and fast investigation.

  • The economics of retaining petabytes of security telemetry in S3 versus legacy hot-tiers.
  • How S3-native search changes the investigation workflow for security analysts.
  • Moving from static detection rules to adaptive, environment-aware baselines.
  • Why Agentic SIEM is the only way to process signals into fully-contextualized cases at scale.
